capabilities: Ensure batch processing systems leverage AI-prompting derived knowledge bases to optimize task execution, maintaining accuracy and efficiency under domain-specific constraints.

procedure.action: Execute batch processing tasks using AI-prompting derived knowledge bases by integrating domain-specific APIs; ensure error_count < 1 and result_valid = true for each task.

Log operation_duration_ms and result_code for each batch task execution to an audit trail using a structured logging framework like ELK Stack using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.
Restate the batch processing procedure with domain-specific constraints by configuring task parameters in accordance with AI-derived insights; verify error_count < 1.

Assert the output of each batch task by running domain-specific validation scripts; ensure result_valid = true and log discrepancies to a monitoring dashboard by asserting all required fields conform to the schema definition; emit VALIDATION_FAILED with field path on the first failing field; assert field_validation_pass_rate >= 1.0.

Observe batch processing performance metrics using a telemetry pipeline; trigger alerts if operation_duration_ms exceeds predefined thresholds for consecutive runs by polling the target metric at interval_ms < 60000; emit METRIC_ALERT if value exceeds threshold for 3 consecutive samples; assert alert_latency < 5000ms.

summary: Apply specialization to batch processing by integrating AI-prompting derived knowledge bases, ensuring domain-specific constraints are met with error-free execution.
title: Specialization

failureConditions: Inaccurate batch processing results when AI-derived constraints are not applied, causing downstream data inconsistencies.
Increased error rates when domain-specific validation is omitted, leading to invalid data propagation.
Performance degradation when operation_duration_ms is not monitored, causing SLA breaches.
metrics: the output of each batch task by running domain-specific validation scripts
